sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39184" key="e)pi/dhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπίδημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n39184.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cushion</tr_> (?), dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:2:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.48</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
